Build a complete Python implementation of a columnar query engine that reads data from CSV and Parquet files, applies vectorized operations using NumPy, performs hash aggregations, and outputs results as Arrow record batches.

Write a full Go implementation of a distributed task execution framework where tasks are defined as Docker containers, scheduled across a cluster using bin packing, monitored for completion, and retried on failure with exponential backoff.

Implement a complete TypeScript implementation of a micro-frontend orchestration layer that dynamically loads remote UI modules using module federation, manages shared state between modules, and handles module load failures gracefully.

Build a Python script that performs automated extraction of API contracts from integration test suites by intercepting HTTP calls during test execution and generating OpenAPI specifications from observed request and response patterns.

Write a complete Node.js implementation of a distributed saga orchestrator that coordinates multi-step business transactions across microservices, persists saga state to MongoDB, handles partial failures with compensation actions, and provides a REST API for saga management.

Implement a full Go implementation of a custom serialization format optimized for append-only log storage with variable-length field encoding, checksums for integrity verification, and an index structure for O(1) record lookup by offset.

Build a complete Python implementation of a reinforcement learning environment simulator for supply chain optimization where an agent controls inventory levels, and the environment simulates stochastic demand and lead times.

Write a TypeScript implementation of a real-time collaborative code review tool where multiple reviewers can annotate code simultaneously, comments are synchronized via WebSocket using OT, and review threads are resolved with consensus.

Implement a Python script that performs automated profiling of React application rendering performance by instrumenting React's reconciliation process, identifying unnecessary re-renders, and suggesting useMemo and useCallback optimizations.

Build a complete Go implementation of a network flow analyzer that captures packets using libpcap, reconstructs TCP flows, extracts application-layer protocols, and generates per-flow statistics including bandwidth, latency, and retransmission rates.

Write a full Python implementation of a distributed graph processing framework where graph partitions are distributed across worker nodes, algorithms like PageRank and shortest paths are executed using a Pregel-style bulk synchronous parallel model.

Implement a complete Node.js implementation of a multi-protocol message broker that accepts messages via HTTP, WebSocket, MQTT, and AMQP, routes them based on configurable rules, and delivers to subscribers with guaranteed ordering.

Build a TypeScript implementation of a compile-time safe builder pattern generator that takes interface definitions and generates fluent builder classes with required and optional fields enforced through the TypeScript type system.

Write a Python class that implements a distributed timeline service that stores events with nanosecond timestamps, supports range queries with server-side filtering, handles clock skew between nodes, and provides linearizable reads.

Implement a complete Go implementation of a service that performs live traffic shadowing where production requests are duplicated to a shadow environment, responses are compared, and differences are logged for analysis.

Build a Python script that performs automated generation of data pipeline documentation by analyzing Airflow DAG definitions, inferring data sources and sinks, computing lineage, and generating interactive HTML documentation.

Write a full TypeScript implementation of a GraphQL schema stitching layer that merges schemas from multiple downstream GraphQL services, resolves cross-service relationships, and optimizes query execution using query batching.

Implement a Python class that provides a distributed session management system with session affinity using consistent hashing, automatic session migration on node failure, and encryption of session data at rest.

Build a complete Go implementation of a binary analysis tool that disassembles ELF executables, reconstructs control flow graphs, identifies common vulnerability patterns, and generates annotated disassembly reports.

Write a Node.js implementation of a real-time inventory management system with distributed stock reservations using Redis, optimistic locking for concurrent purchases, automatic stock replenishment triggers, and a WebSocket dashboard.

Implement a full Python implementation of a multi-tenant job processing system where jobs are isolated per tenant, resource quotas are enforced, priority scheduling ensures fair resource sharing, and tenant-specific metrics are collected.

Build a TypeScript implementation of a headless CMS API layer that manages content types defined in a schema, provides CRUD endpoints with field-level permissions, generates TypeScript types for content models, and supports draft and published states.

Write a Python script that performs automated detection of API breaking changes between service versions by comparing request and response schemas, detecting removed fields, changed types, and stricter validation rules.

Implement a complete Go implementation of a distributed lock service using Paxos consensus with lease-based locking, automatic lease renewal, lock waiters with timeout, and observability via Prometheus metrics.

Build a Python class that implements a complete implementation of a columnar in-memory analytics database with vectorized execution, late materialization, dictionary encoding, and parallel query execution across CPU cores.

Write a full Node.js implementation of a data masking service that intercepts database queries, identifies sensitive columns using a policy engine, applies configurable masking strategies, and logs all data access with context.

Implement a TypeScript implementation of a full-featured WYSIWYG email template builder with drag-and-drop blocks, responsive layout preview, variable substitution, and HTML output generation compatible with major email clients.

Build a Python script that performs automated dependency hell detection in a Python monorepo by building a complete dependency graph, identifying diamond dependency conflicts, and suggesting resolution strategies.

Write a complete Go implementation of a real-time position tracking system for a logistics fleet where vehicle positions are ingested via MQTT, stored in a time-series database, and served via a WebSocket API with geospatial filtering.

Implement a full Python implementation of a streaming ETL pipeline that reads from multiple PostgreSQL databases using logical replication, applies transformations including enrichment and deduplication, and loads into a data warehouse.

Build a TypeScript implementation of a distributed testing framework that parallelizes test execution across multiple machines, shards test suites by estimated duration, aggregates results, and generates combined coverage reports.

Write a Python class that provides a smart connection pool that monitors query latency per database connection, routes queries to the fastest available connection, and automatically removes connections that exhibit degraded performance.

Implement a complete Go implementation of a custom networking stack for a peer-to-peer application with NAT traversal using STUN, encrypted tunnels using Noise protocol, and relay fallback for symmetric NAT scenarios.

Build a Python script that performs automated generation of realistic test fixtures for a REST API by analyzing production request logs, extracting representative samples per endpoint, and generating sanitized test data.

Write a full Node.js implementation of a smart rate limiter that dynamically adjusts limits based on server load, client behavior history, and time of day patterns learned from historical traffic data.
Implement a TypeScript implementation of a compile-time query validation system for a custom query language that checks queries against a schema at build time using TypeScript template literal types.

Build a Python class that implements a distributed consensus-based counter that supports increment, decrement, and read operations with linearizable consistency across a cluster of nodes using a replicated log.

Write a complete Go implementation of a service that generates dynamic API documentation by introspecting running microservices, collecting endpoint metadata via reflection, and assembling a unified OpenAPI specification.

Implement a full Python implementation of an intelligent alerting system that correlates related alerts from multiple monitoring systems, groups them into incidents, suppresses flapping alerts, and routes to on-call engineers.

Build a TypeScript implementation of a lazy-loading module system for a large single-page application that splits code by route and component, prefetches likely-needed modules based on user navigation patterns.

Write a Python script that performs automated generation of security test cases for a REST API by analyzing the OpenAPI specification, identifying injection points, and generating fuzzing payloads for authentication bypass and data exposure.

Implement a complete Go implementation of a distributed aggregation pipeline where data flows through a chain of processing nodes, each node applies transformations and aggregations, and results are merged at a final collection node.

Build a Python class that provides a reactive caching layer where cached values automatically recompute when their dependencies change, using a directed acyclic graph to track dependencies and propagate invalidations.

Write a full Node.js implementation of a multi-tenant webhook delivery system that queues outgoing webhooks per tenant, manages delivery retries with exponential backoff, handles endpoint health checks, and provides delivery analytics.

Implement a TypeScript implementation of a zero-configuration testing library that automatically discovers test files, infers test structure from function names, generates test stubs, and produces detailed failure messages.

Build a Python script that performs automated analysis of a distributed system's failure modes by parsing incident reports, clustering failure patterns, computing mean time to recovery, and identifying systemic weaknesses.

Write a complete Go implementation of a service mesh telemetry collector that aggregates metrics from all service instances, computes golden signals including error rate, latency percentiles, and throughput, and exposes them via Prometheus.

Implement a full Python implementation of a query result streaming system that executes large database queries, streams results row by row to clients over gRPC, applies server-side transformations, and handles client disconnections gracefully.

Build a TypeScript implementation of a visual regression testing system that renders UI components in a headless browser, captures screenshots, compares them pixel-by-pixel against baselines, and highlights differences.

Write a Python class that implements a distributed Bloom filter with consistent hashing to distribute bit arrays across nodes, routing membership test requests to the correct node, and merging results for multi-shard queries.

Implement a complete Go implementation of a cloud-agnostic secrets manager that stores encrypted secrets in multiple cloud providers simultaneously, rotates them on schedule, and provides a unified API for secret retrieval.

Build a Python script that performs automated discovery and cataloging of data assets across an organization by scanning databases, file systems, and APIs, inferring data schemas, and populating a metadata catalog.

Write a full Node.js implementation of a real-time collaborative spreadsheet engine with formula evaluation, cell dependency tracking, circular dependency detection, and multi-user editing with conflict resolution.

Implement a TypeScript implementation of a headless browser automation library from scratch that controls Chromium via the DevTools Protocol, supports page navigation, element interaction, network interception, and screenshot capture.

Build a Python class that provides an adaptive load balancer that continuously measures backend latency using exponential moving averages and dynamically adjusts traffic weights to minimize response time.

Write a complete Go implementation of a custom metrics aggregation server that accepts StatsD-format metrics over UDP, aggregates them per flush interval, applies downsampling, and forwards to multiple downstream metrics systems.

Implement a full Python implementation of a distributed job prioritization system where jobs have dynamic priorities based on wait time, resource requirements, and tenant SLAs, with work-stealing between queues.

Build a TypeScript implementation of a reactive API client that automatically retries failed requests with exponential backoff, de-duplicates concurrent identical requests, and updates reactive state on response.

Write a Python script that performs automated migration of Jupyter notebooks to production Python scripts by analyzing notebook cells, inferring function boundaries, extracting reusable components, and generating a modular codebase.

Implement a complete Go implementation of a real-time auction bidding engine that handles thousands of concurrent bids, enforces bidding rules atomically using Redis transactions, and broadcasts results via WebSocket.

Build a Python class that implements a complete S3-compatible object storage server from scratch with bucket management, object CRUD operations, multipart upload, presigned URL generation, and access control policies.

Write a full Node.js implementation of a CRDT-based shared state library for building collaborative applications, supporting counters, sets, maps, and text CRDTs with efficient delta-based synchronization.

Implement a TypeScript implementation of a fully functional OAuth 2.1 client library that handles authorization code flow with PKCE, token refresh, token storage with encryption, and automatic token renewal.

Build a Python script that performs automated identification of performance regression between two service versions by replaying production traffic against both versions and performing statistical significance testing on latency distributions.

Write a complete Go implementation of a distributed job queue with configurable back-pressure mechanisms that slow down producers when consumers fall behind, preventing memory exhaustion in high-throughput scenarios.

Implement a full Python implementation of a rule-based expert system with forward and backward chaining inference, truth maintenance for retracting facts, conflict resolution strategies, and an explanation facility.

Build a TypeScript implementation of a server-side rendering cache that caches component outputs keyed by props hash, invalidates cache entries when underlying data changes, and warms the cache proactively.

Write a Python class that provides a distributed schema registry that stores Avro and Protobuf schemas, validates schema compatibility on registration, assigns schema IDs, and serves schemas to serializers and deserializers.

Implement a complete Go implementation of a network packet generator that creates synthetic traffic following statistical models of real application traffic, used for testing network equipment and monitoring systems.

Build a Python script that performs automated analysis of test suite quality by measuring mutation testing score, identifying test gaps, generating additional test cases for uncovered mutations, and tracking improvement over time.

Write a full Node.js implementation of a data enrichment pipeline that enhances incoming records by joining them with reference data from multiple external APIs, caches enrichment results with TTL, and handles API failures gracefully.

Implement a TypeScript implementation of a distributed rate limiting library using the token bucket algorithm with Redis as the shared state store, supporting per-user, per-endpoint, and global rate limits simultaneously.

Build a Python class that implements a complete implementation of the Raft consensus algorithm with leader election, log replication, log compaction using snapshots, and membership changes using joint consensus.

Write a complete Go implementation of a container log aggregator that tails logs from multiple Docker containers, parses structured and unstructured log formats, enriches entries with container metadata, and ships to Elasticsearch.

Implement a full Python implementation of a streaming machine learning pipeline that continuously ingests labeled training data, retrains models incrementally using mini-batch gradient descent, and deploys updated models without downtime.

Build a TypeScript implementation of a type-safe event emitter library where event names and payload types are defined in a typed map, emission and subscription are fully typed, and unused event types cause compilation warnings.

Write a Python script that performs automated generation of system test scenarios from user stories by parsing acceptance criteria, identifying system boundaries, generating test data, and producing executable BDD scenarios.

Implement a complete Go implementation of an adaptive caching proxy that learns which backend responses are safe to cache based on observed cache-control headers and response times, and automatically applies caching policies.
Build a Python class that provides a distributed timeline service for event ordering across multiple nodes, using hybrid logical clocks to maintain causality while staying close to physical time.

Write a full Node.js implementation of a real-time configuration hot-reload system where services receive configuration updates within milliseconds of a change, with validation before application and rollback on error.

Implement a TypeScript implementation of a reactive query engine over IndexedDB that translates declarative queries into IndexedDB operations, reactively re-runs queries when underlying data changes, and manages query subscriptions.

Build a Python script that performs automated analysis of code review feedback patterns by mining pull request comments, clustering feedback into categories, identifying recurring issues, and generating team-specific coding guidelines.

Write a complete Go implementation of a distributed system debugger that captures system state snapshots at configurable intervals, allows replaying execution from any snapshot, and compares state across runs to identify divergence.

Implement a full Python implementation of a probabilistic data pipeline that tracks uncertainty through transformations, propagates confidence intervals, and produces outputs with associated confidence scores.

Build a TypeScript implementation of a multi-agent task coordination system where agents negotiate task assignments using a contract net protocol, bid on tasks based on capability and availability, and coordinate completion.
Write a Python class that implements a custom bytecode format for a scripting language with an assembler, disassembler, and a register-based virtual machine with garbage collection.

Implement a complete Go implementation of a cloud cost optimizer that analyzes resource usage patterns, identifies cost-saving opportunities such as reserved instance purchases and spot instance use, and generates purchase recommendations.

Build a Python script that performs automated generation of API integration tests by recording HTTP interactions during manual testing sessions and generating pytest test cases with assertions on response structure.

Write a full Node.js implementation of a distributed session store that partitions sessions across multiple Redis nodes using consistent hashing, handles node failures transparently, and supports session migration.

Implement a TypeScript implementation of an offline-first database client that stores data locally using IndexedDB, synchronizes with a server when online, resolves conflicts using a last-write-wins strategy, and tracks sync status per record.

Build a Python class that provides a streaming data validation framework where validation rules are defined as composable predicates, applied to data streams in real time, and violations are reported to a configurable sink.

Write a complete Go implementation of a peer-to-peer file synchronization system where nodes discover each other via mDNS, compute file diffs using rolling checksums, and transfer only changed blocks.

Implement a full Python implementation of a multi-model ensemble inference system that routes prediction requests to the most appropriate model based on input features, combines predictions using stacking, and tracks model performance.

Build a TypeScript implementation of a serverless function orchestration engine that executes workflow definitions as state machines, manages function invocations with retry logic, and tracks execution history in DynamoDB.

Write a Python script that performs automated detection of dead code in a large Python codebase by building a call graph from all entry points, identifying unreachable functions and classes, and generating a removal plan.
Implement a complete Go implementation of a real-time event enrichment service that joins incoming events with dimension data from multiple sources using an in-memory cache with TTL-based refresh.

Build a Python class that implements a distributed publish-subscribe system with topic-based routing, message filtering using attribute predicates, fan-out delivery to multiple subscribers, and persistent message replay.

Write a full Node.js implementation of a distributed search autocomplete service that indexes terms from product catalogs, suggests completions in under 10ms using a trie structure stored in Redis, and personalizes suggestions per user.

Implement a TypeScript implementation of a functional error boundary library for React that catches errors in component trees, provides typed error recovery strategies, logs errors with context, and renders fallback UI.

Build a Python script that performs automated optimization of Docker image sizes by analyzing layer contents, identifying large unnecessary files, suggesting multi-stage build improvements, and generating optimized Dockerfiles.
